codeReview.summary: All four shared UI components (AnimatedModal, Toast, Skeleton, Button) are well-implemented and match the feature requirements. AnimatedModal uses m.div with AnimatePresence, isOpen/onClose props, and backdrop click-to-close. Toast system provides ToastProvider context with useToast hook, supports success/error/info types, auto-dismisses after 3s, animates from top with spring physics, and is mounted globally in LayoutWrapper. Skeleton components have a base Skeleton with shimmer animation (CSS keyframes in globals.css) plus ProductCardSkeleton and MatchCardSkeleton variants. Button component uses m.button with whileTap scale(0.97), supports 4 variants (primary/secondary/outline/ghost) and 3 sizes, with proper disabled/loading state handling. All loading spinners across 6 pages replaced with skeleton components. Zero animate-spin patterns remain (verified). 29 new tests added covering all components with good assertion coverage. Tests were updated for basketball and concert pages to check for skeletons instead of spinners. Two non-blocking issues found.

issues.description: Button outline and ghost variants use `hover:bg-blue-50` which is a default Tailwind blue color, not a semantic design token. AGENTS.md convention says to ALWAYS use semantic token classes. Should be `hover:bg-primary-50` to match the project's token system.

Toast ID generation uses `Date.now()` which could produce duplicate IDs if two toasts are triggered in the same millisecond. While unlikely in practice, a counter or crypto.randomUUID() would be more robust.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Button component uses `hover:bg-blue-50` for outline and ghost variants, violating the AGENTS.md convention to 'ALWAYS use semantic token classes'. The convention is clear, but the worker still used a non-token color. This suggests the convention could be more prominent or enforced via lint rule.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: components/ui/Button.tsx:15-16 — `outline: 'border-2 border-primary-500 text-primary-500 hover:bg-blue-50'` and `ghost: 'text-primary-500 hover:bg-blue-50'`. Should use `hover:bg-primary-50` per tailwind.config.ts tokens.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md now documents 'Use the shared Button, AnimatedModal, Toast, and Skeleton components' under Component Structure, but the event detail and product detail pages still use raw <button> elements for action buttons instead of the shared Button component. The feature description did not require replacing all buttons project-wide (only spinners), so this is not a failure — but it represents an incomplete migration that future features should address.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: app/events/[id]/page.tsx:174-185 and app/products/[id]/page.tsx:138-149 use raw <button> elements with inline gradient styles instead of <Button variant='primary'> or <Button variant='outline'>.

summary: Feature passes review. All 4 shared UI components are correctly implemented with proper motion animations, TypeScript typing, and comprehensive tests (29 new tests). All loading spinners replaced with skeleton components across 6 pages, zero animate-spin patterns remain. ToastProvider is globally mounted in LayoutWrapper. Two non-blocking issues found: (1) Button uses non-semantic `hover:bg-blue-50` instead of `hover:bg-primary-50`, (2) Toast uses Date.now() for ID generation which could theoretically produce duplicates. Neither issue blocks functionality or the feature's acceptance criteria.
